_comment: Positional column overrides for Bart Torvik getadvstats.php?csv=1 (67-col layout, verified from 2026 --inspect dumps incl. top scorers AJ Dybantsa/Dior Johnson/Jordan Riley). Per-game box columns at 57-63 anchored by oreb+dreb=reb. min_pg(54): min_pct~=min_pg*0.4 for full-season players. drtg(47): ordered by defensive quality. bpm(28): signed, ordered by impact (col 48 is PORPAG, always >=0). position corrected 33(hometown)->64(type). fg_pct/tov_pg/dunk_rate/rim_rate are not isolated columns in this export and stay NULL.
